title: T-037 — UI: TEC-020 BOM List screen
prompt: Build /technical/boms page (TEC-020, §7.5) listing BOMs across items with version timeline. Filter by item, status. Match prototype `bom_list` prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-list.jsx:3-95 and `boms_screen` prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/data-screens.jsx:55-103. RED tests/ui/tec-020-bom-list.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-020-bom-list.test.tsx`. Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.

pipeline_inputs.description: BOM list with version timeline and item-scoped filters.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use shadcn Table. Row expansion shows version timeline. Top-right button 'Generate BOMs' opens TEC-024 generator modal.
acceptance_criteria: Given the BOM list renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-list.jsx:3-95 and prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/data-screens.jsx:55-103, then column order, filter chips, and Generate BOMs CTA position match — structural + visual + interaction parity confirmed via RTL.
Given filter status='active', when applied, then table reloads with only active BOMs.
Given user clicks Generate BOMs, when fired, then TEC-024 modal opens.

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + filter behaviour.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not load all BOMs unpaginated.

Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.
